simple.label: Simple

props.title: Header Title is the Title Prop
props.text: Hello Body Text, Nice to meet ya.

subcomponents.label: Compound Components
subcomponents.template:
<Dialog opened={dialogOpen} onClose={closeDialog}{{props}}>
  <Dialog.Header>Header Title inside Dialog.Header</Dialog.Header>
  <Dialog.Body>{{children}}</Dialog.Body>
  <Dialog.Footer>
    <Button onClick={closeDialog}>Okay</Button>
    <Button onClick={closeDialog} variant="link">Cancel Button</Button>
  </Dialog.Footer>
</Dialog>
subcomponents.children: Hello Body Text, Nice to meet ya.

children.default: Custom dialog content goes here when you are not using the title and text props.

props.title: Small dialog
props.text: Narrow width for short confirmations and alerts.

props.title: Large dialog
props.text: Wider layout for dense content or two-column layouts.

props.title: Success
props.text: Compact status layout for confirmations and feedback.

presets.name: Compound components
presets.children: Hello Body Text, Nice to meet ya.

presets.name: Full height compound
presets.children: Custom dialog content goes here when you need more vertical space.

status_dialog.message: Status dialogs show an icon, title, and body copy in a centered layout.

compound_components_info.message: Use Compound Components when you need custom header, body, or footer content instead of the simple title/text/button props API.

full_height_info.message: fullHeight is most useful with the compound structure when the dialog contains richer or scrollable content.
